title: Call
subtitle: Call stores slots related to activation.

members.name: argAt
members.description:
Returns the message's argNumber arg. Shorthand for same as call message
    argAt(argNumber).

members.name: argCount
members.description: Returns the number of arguments for the call. Shortcut for "call message argCount".

members.name: coroutine
members.description: Returns the coroutine in which the message was sent.

members.name: delegateTo
members.description:
Sends the call's message to target (and relays it's stop status).
		The sender is set to altSender, if it is supplied.
		Returns the result of the message.

members.name: delegateToMethod
members.description:
Sends the call's message to target via the method specified by methodName.
		Returns the result of the message.

members.name: description
members.description: Returns a description of the receiver as a String.

members.name: evalArgAt
members.description:
Evaluates the specified argument of the Call's message in the context of its
    sender.

members.name: evalArgs
members.description: Returns a list containing the call message arguments evaluated in the context of the sender.

members.name: hasArgs
members.description: Returns true if the call was passed arguments.

members.name: relayStopStatus
members.description:
Sets sender's stop status (Normal, Return, 
  Break, Continue etc.) and returns evaluated argument.

members.name: resetStopStatus
members.description:
Sets stop status to Normal.
  See also <tt>Call setStopStatus</tt>.

members.name: setStopStatus
members.description: Sets the stop status on the call.

members.name: stopStatus
members.description:
Returns the stop status on the call. (description of stopStatus will
    be added once we decide whether or not to keep it)
